name: SpaceHopper
author: Poki
description: It's time to reach the stars in SpaceHopper! In this game, you play as an astronaut who has to collect every star. To get from planet to planet, you can simply jump up! Use the gravitational field of the planets to jump further, but watch out for the aliens! This classic Flash game is now back in HTML 5 so you can play it whenever you like! Can you get all the stars? How to play Temple Glider? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Who created SpaceHopper? SpaceHopper is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: swindler, Canopy and Temple Glider How can I play SpaceHopper for free? You can play SpaceHopper for free on Poki. Can I play SpaceHopper on mobile devices and desktop? SpaceHopper can be played only on your computer.
